# Sítio Girassol

> Vacation rental property with pool in São Roque, SP, Brazil — 60 km from São Paulo

## Property Overview
- Type: Entire house (chalet) on 2.6 hectares
- Location: São Roque, São Paulo, Brazil
- Capacity: 6 guests, 3 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, 280 sqm
- Highlights: Private pool, BBQ area, fireplace, pet-friendly, sports courts

## Pricing
- Nightly: R$ 340 BRL
- Weekly: R$ 228/night (33% discount)
- Monthly: R$ 170/night (50% discount)
- Check-in: 12:00 PM | Check-out: 6:00 PM

## Key Amenities
- Private pool with sun loungers
- 2 BBQ areas (churrasqueira) with outdoor kitchen
- Indoor fireplace
- Tennis, volleyball, football, and badminton courts
- Wi-Fi, TV, game room with foosball
- Full kitchen, washer, parking
- Pet-friendly, children welcome

## Location
- Coordinates: -23.4907, -47.2706
- 60 km from São Paulo city center (~1-1.5 hours drive)
- Near São Roque wine region (Rota do Vinho)
- Surrounded by Atlantic Forest nature

## Contact & Booking
- Website: https://www.sitiogirassol.org
- Airbnb: https://www.airbnb.com.br/rooms/1345960842338220775
- Instagram: @sitiogirassol.sp
